compiled_state.title: RED test: escalation routing integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_escalation_routing.py with structural validation tests.

Tests:
1. test_routing_section_exists — SKILL.md contains escalation routing section
2. test_routing_dispatches_script — references gate-escalation-router.py
3. test_auto_fix_path — documents 0-signal auto-fix path
4. test_dialog_path — documents 1-signal dialog with blast radius context
5. test_escalate_path — documents 2+-signal escalation to /dso:brainstorm
6. test_complex_override — documents COMPLEX always-escalate
7. test_routing_after_gates — routing appears after all gate sections
8. test_interactivity_integration — documents debug-everything interactivity flag integration

Docstring: structural metadata validation — design contract verification.
Append to .test-index for fix-bug/SKILL.md (comma-separated value list).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_escalation_routing.py
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_escalation_routing.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_escalation_routing'

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for escalation routing SKILL.md integration written — 8 tests RED
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
